title: [MTR4]My Fantasy Trains Collection|我的幻想列车合集
description:
My fantasy train, it has both secondary and original made
我的幻想列车，同时包含二创和原创
body:
## 使用要求：
1. 允许二创，但必须无条件免费发布
2. 严禁倒卖
## 介绍：
这个资源包，同时需要MTR,JCM,MSD和天津地铁
目前包含以下资源（最高版本）：
1. 首三个猫meme列车（拉跨B站某人，不配。每个分为三种长度）
2. 首个cheems列车（分为三种长度）
3. 深圳地铁6，9，13，14，16，20号线（每个分为三种长度）
4. 首七个疯狂动物城2列车（每个分为三种长度）
5. 首个十五运会列车（有SP1900和C1141A，每个分为三种长度）
6. 首两个浪浪山小妖怪列车（每个分为三种长度）
7. 首个汤圆酱列车（分为三种长度）
8. 首个罗小黑战记2PIDS（JCM）
9. 首个猫memePIDS（天津地铁）
10. MSD售票机，乘客咨询显示屏去除日语
11. MTR标志改为猫meme
12. 西安地铁所有列车（分为三种长度）
13. 成都地铁1号线（分为三种长度）
14. 广州地铁所有A,B,L型车
15. 由于更高版本不兼容问题，MTR玻璃贴图修改已在1.6版本中被移除
16. CRH1E,2A/B/C,2E,2G,3A,3C,5A，CR300AF,BF,CR400AF,BF,CR450AF,BF（1.9版本中已移除）

以下列车为二创：
1. Q-Train（分为三种长度）
2. C151A（分为三种长度）
3. C151B（分为三种长度）
4. C151C（分为三种长度）
5. C751B（分为三种长度）

注意！
只支持MTR4.0.0beta8以上的版本！

B站账号：[https://space.bilibili.com/3690971061553353?spm_id_from=333.1007.0.0](https://space.bilibili.com/3690971061553353?spm_id_from=333.1007.0.0)

快手账号：[https://www.kuaishou.com/profile/3xzhv8wqyx4rgfw](https://www.kuaishou.com/profile/3xzhv8wqyx4rgfw)

## Usage requirements:
1. Secondary creation is allowed, but it must be unconditionally and freely released
2. Resale is strictly prohibited
## Introduction:
This resource package requires MTR, JCM, MSD, and Tianjin Metro
Currently, there are these resourses included below(The highest version):
1. The first three cat meme trains (disparaging someone from Bilibili, not worthy. Each is divided into three lengths)
2. The first cheems train (available in three different lengths)
3. Shenzhen Metro Lines 6, 9, 13, 14, 16, and 20 (each line is divided into three lengths)
4. The first seven "Zootopia 2" trains (each divided into three lengths)
5. The first two trains for the 15th National Games (in China, including SP1900 and C1141A, each available in three different lengths)
6. The first two Langlang Mountain Little Monster Train (each available in three different lengths)
7. The first Tangyuanjiang train (available in three lengths)
8. The first "Luo Xiahei Battle Chronicles 2" PIDS (JCM)
9. The first Cat Meme PIDS (Tianjin Metro)
10. Remove Japanese from MSD ticket machines and passenger information displays
11. Change the MTR logo to Cat Meme
12. All the trains of Xi'an Metro (available in three different lengths)
13. Chengdu Metro Line 1 (available in three different lengths)
14. Guangzhou Metro All Types of A,B,L
15. Due to incompatibility issues with later versions, the MTR glass texture modification has been removed in version 1.6
16. CRH1E,2A/B/C,2E,2G,3A,3C,5A，CR300AF,BF,CR400AF,BF,CR450AF,BF（Has been removed in version 1.9）

The following trains are secondary creations:
1. Q-Train (available in three different lengths)
2. C151A (available in three lengths)
3. C151B (available in three different lengths)
4. C151C (divided into three lengths)
5. C751B (available in three different lengths)

Attention!
Only versions later than MTR4.0.0beta8 are supported!

Bilibili account: [https://space.bilibili.com/3690971061553353?spm_id_from=333.1007.0.0](https://space.bilibili.com/3690971061553353?spm_id_from=333.1007.0.0)

Kwai account: [https://www.kuaishou.com/profile/3xzhv8wqyx4rgfw](https://www.kuaishou.com/profile/3xzhv8wqyx4rgfw)
